---
name: ✅ Verify or Update Gap
description: Verify an existing gap, add new details, or report it as patched
title: "[VERIFY] Gap ID: [e.g., M2-SYN-001]"
labels: ["verification", "data-update"]
---

## 🔗 Which Gap?

**Gap ID (if known):**
<!-- e.g., M2-SYN-001 → view the dashboard to find the ID -->

**OR Station Name:**
<!-- If you don't know the ID, just tell us the station -->

---

## ✅ What are you reporting?

- [ ] **Verification** — I can confirm this gap still exists
- [ ] **Update** — I have new information about this gap
- [ ] **Patched/Fixed** — This gap has been closed or fixed
- [ ] **Correction** — The existing data is wrong

---

## 📋 Verification Details

**Last Time Observed:**
<!-- When did you last confirm this gap exists? e.g., "June 1, 2026, 3 PM" -->

**Current Status:**
- [ ] Still active (as reported)
- [ ] Changed or degraded
- [ ] Improved or partially fixed
- [ ] Completely patched/closed
- [ ] Unclear

**Additional Information:**
<!-- Any new observations or changes? e.g.:
- "Staff now present on weekends"
- "Cameras were added in the elevator"
- "Gate was repaired"
- "Gap is larger than originally described"
-->

---

## 📸 Updated Evidence (Optional)

**Do you have new photos/video?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

<!-- Drag and drop images or provide links -->

---

## 📝 Changes or Corrections

**What should be updated?**
<!-- Which fields need correction or clarification? -->

---

## ⚠️ Confirmation

By submitting this, you confirm:
- [ ] I have personally verified this information
- [ ] I am reporting this **for security improvement only**
- [ ] I understand this data will be **public**
- [ ] This information is accurate to the **best of my knowledge**
